subject: Update rtl8188eu driver.
author: Sorgelig

impact.effect_if_absent: rtl8188eu USB WiFi adapter driver not available in kernel; superseded by rtl8188eu-aircrack-ng Buildroot package in current 6.18 build

license_provenance.header: Realtek GPL-2.0 boilerplate: 'Copyright(c) 2007 - 2017 Realtek Corporation. This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of version 2 of the GNU General Public License...'

notes: Huge vendored driver update (695 files, 168K insertions, 273K deletions). v5.13.12 kernel branch only. Per patch-provenance.md §3.6: rtl8188eu and related Realtek drivers were re-sourced from kernel vendor to Buildroot out-of-tree packages (rtl8188eu-aircrack-ng). Directive: 'Do not vendor.' Current 6.18 build ships rtl8188eu-aircrack-ng package instead. This commit's kernel changes are NOT carried forward to 6.18. Disposition: obsolete in current build context.
